classes.label: Person
classes.description: A human individual, such as a student or staff member.

classes.label: Major
classes.description: An academic major or field of study.

classes.label: Approval Unit
classes.description: A superior department that approves overseas travel and issues approval documents.

datatype_properties.label: has name
datatype_properties.description: The full name of a person.

datatype_properties.label: has English name
datatype_properties.description: The English name of a person.

datatype_properties.label: has name pinyin
datatype_properties.description: The pinyin representation of a person's name.

datatype_properties.description: A name previously formally used by a person.

datatype_properties.description: The gender code of a person.

datatype_properties.description: The birth date of a person.

datatype_properties.description: The code for the birth place of a person.

datatype_properties.label: has native place
datatype_properties.description: The native place or ancestral home of a person.

datatype_properties.label: has nationality code
datatype_properties.description: The nationality or region code of a person.

datatype_properties.label: has ID type code
datatype_properties.description: The type code of a person's identity document.

datatype_properties.label: has ID number
datatype_properties.description: The number of a person's identity document.

datatype_properties.description: The marital status code of a person.

datatype_properties.description: The code indicating if a person is from Hong Kong, Macau, Taiwan, or overseas.

datatype_properties.label: has political status code
datatype_properties.description: The political affiliation or status code of a person.

datatype_properties.label: has health status code
datatype_properties.description: The health status code of a person.

datatype_properties.label: has religion code
datatype_properties.description: The religious belief code of a person.

datatype_properties.label: has blood type code
datatype_properties.description: The blood type code of a person.

datatype_properties.label: has person number
datatype_properties.description: The student or staff number of a person.

datatype_properties.label: has ID expiry date
datatype_properties.description: The expiry date of a person's identity document.

datatype_properties.label: is only child
datatype_properties.description: Indicates if a person is an only child (1 for yes, 0 for no).

datatype_properties.label: has grade
datatype_properties.description: The grade level of a student.

datatype_properties.description: The duration of schooling in years.

datatype_properties.description: The school-compiled number of a course.

datatype_properties.description: The code for an academic major.

datatype_properties.description: The name of an academic major.

datatype_properties.label: has ethnicity code
datatype_properties.description: The 2-digit code for an ethnicity.

datatype_properties.label: has position order
datatype_properties.description: The order number of a leading cadre within a leadership group.

datatype_properties.description: The name of the superior department that approved overseas travel.

datatype_properties.label: has book barcode
datatype_properties.description: The barcode corresponding to a book.

datatype_properties.description: The code for a person's relationship.
